$schema_note: Each feature flows: pending -> spec_ready -> in_progress -> done (or blocked). 'sdd: true' features MUST pass through spec_author + the human approval gate before implementation. Keep features small and independently shippable; declare dependencies in 'depends_on'.

features.name: 00_project_setup
features.description: Bootstrap the Next.js (App Router, TypeScript) app: pnpm, Tailwind + shadcn/ui, Prisma wired to the hosted Supabase Postgres (DATABASE_URL pooled + DIRECT_URL), @supabase/ssr clients (browser + server) and auth middleware, dnd-kit installed, Vitest + Playwright configured, ESLint/Prettier, .env.example, and Vercel project settings. Foundation for everything.

features.name: 01_auth_and_user_management
features.description: Authentication and roles: User/Role(ADMIN|EMPLOYEE) Prisma model synced to Supabase auth, RLS, email/password login page, middleware-driven route protection, lib/auth.ts (requireUser/requireAdmin), and an Admin-only user management UI (invite + role edit).

features.name: 02_catalog_management
features.description: Manageable catalogs as tables (not enums): Color(name + hex), PrintType, SupplyType, TaskCategory with RLS, a seed for the 6 initial colors and initial task categories/print types, and Admin-only CRUD UI with a delete-guard for catalog values already in use.

features.name: 03_task_board_core
features.description: Task + Subtask models with RLS, CRUD server actions (auth + Zod), a statically-rendered Kanban board across the 6 states with task cards and subtask check-off, and server-side filtering by owner, category, and state. No drag-and-drop yet.

features.name: 04_task_board_dnd
features.description: Add dnd-kit interactivity to the board: drag tasks between state columns and reorder within a column, persisting state + integer position via an idempotent server action, with optimistic update + rollback on failure and keyboard-accessible drag.

features.name: 05_expense_tracking
features.description: Expense model (cost Decimal, reason, date, purchase link, supply type) with RLS, CRUD server actions, and a list + create/edit form. Data kept structured (date, supplyType) so future reports/totals need no remodel.

features.name: 06_print_inventory
features.description: Print model with PrintColor many-to-many (colors used), structured printTimeMinutes/filamentGrams, print type, document link, and photo in a private Supabase Storage bucket (policies + signed-URL reads). RLS, CRUD server actions with image upload, and an inventory list with search/filter.

features.name: 07_weekly_planning
features.description: Weekly planner: WeekPlan/WeekPlanColor/WeekPlanItem models with RLS, a color-match service (full match default + partial match showing missing colors), a color picker for the week, the filtered inventory, assigning prints to Monday-Sunday, and a derived 'dry the day before' indicator.
